title: bidens macrocarpa
intro: Bidens macrocarpa, also known as tall beggar ticks, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bidens macrocarpa include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Bidens macrocarpa include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
